problem:
AsyncSqliteSaver.put() and put_writes() deadlock instead of raising when called synchronously from within the event loop. AsyncSqliteSaver exposes synchronous bridge methods that wrap their async
counterparts with asyncio.run_coroutine_threadsafe(...).result(). Calling one
synchronously from within the saver's own event loop blocks the loop on a
coroutine only that loop can run --> a deadlock.
Four of the six sync-bridge wrappers guard against this and raise a
descriptive asyncio.InvalidStateErr
